---
title: "Workflow Peptide: DifferentialAnalysis"
abstract: >
  The page describe the DA step of the Peptide Worflow.

output:
    BiocStyle::html_document:
        highlight: tango
        toc: false
        number_sections: FALSE
date: 19 February 2026
link-citations: true
---
# DifferentialAnalysis

The `DifferentialAnalysis` step ...

***

### Scenario
...

##### Description of parameters and options :
###### **`...`**
...

***

### Fold-change
...

##### Description of parameters and options :
###### **`...`**
...

***

### Fine tuning
...

##### Description of parameters and options :
###### **`...`**
...

***

### P-value calibration
...

##### Description of parameters and options :
###### **`...`**
...

***

### FDR control
...

##### Description of parameters and options :
###### **`...`**
...

***

### Save
...
